artPrompt: A harried goblin bureaucrat perched at a rickety folding station in the burning town square, gesturing impatiently toward an unseen line, papers fluttering in the heat-shimmer; flames lick orange at the edges of the frame, sparks and confetti drifting through ember-red haze and night-black smoke, his weary shout caught in a soft dreamy blur, almost melancholic amid the mayhem, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Goblin Poll Worker
text:
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}, Sacrifice Goblin Poll Worker: Create a 1/1 red Voter creature token. Their shift is over.
flavorText: "Next!" he shouted, to a line that was entirely on fire.
